title: Bank AI Use-Case Record
description: One record = one announced/deployed use of AI or Agentic AI at a bank.

id.description: Stable unique id (slug). Used for dedup.

sector.description: Whether the institution is a bank or a payments provider/network/processor.

bank.description: Institution name — a bank or a payments provider (the specific brand/entity, e.g. 'Isybank', 'Stripe').

parent_group.description: Parent banking group if the bank is a subsidiary/brand, e.g. 'Intesa Sanpaolo'. Empty string if the bank is itself the top-level group.

business_area.description: Where in the bank it was deployed.

title.description: Short headline of the use case.

vendor.description: Tech partner / model provider, if any (e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic, Microsoft, Google, NVIDIA, in-house).

outcome.description: Reported result / impact, quantified where available.

metric.description: Short, scannable measured outcome for the impact zone, e.g. '+22% quality', 'weeks→1 day', '€200m saved'. Empty if no quantified outcome was reported.

event_date.description: When it was announced or deployed (YYYY-MM-DD).

verified.description: True once a human or the ingest pipeline confirmed the source link resolves.

added_at.description: When this record entered the dataset.
